examples: The leased vehicle remains the property of the lessor -- the company that issued the lease.
The Lessor agrees that he shall not increase the rent for a period of 2 years from the date of this contract signing.
The lessor shall, in accordance with the time and standards provided in the contract, turn over the leased property for the use of the lessee.
In the event that the cash flow fails to materialize, the lessor does not get paid.
Of lessor interest but also announced today are the new Parrot Bluetooth picture frames.
